falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes above 5,650 on any daily close within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A new all-time high would invalidate the 79% bottom_2024_aug pattern match, as that pattern formed after a significant drawdown with no immediate recovery to highs; this would signal continuation rather than bottoming behavior

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes below 12.50 for 3 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained complacency at pre-correction levels would falsify the bottoming thesis, as the August 2024 bottom featured VIX remaining elevated (15-20+) for weeks post-low; rapid VIX normalization indicates no accumulation phase

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.85% while SPX simultaneously trades below 5,200
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal recessionary panic rather than growth-scare bottom, breaking the pattern of August 2024 where yields stabilized/rise with equities; the macro engine's bottom pattern requires rates-floor/soft-landing dynamics, not flight-to-safety bid

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
